# Leading Business Valuation Services
Eton provides audit-defensible business valuations across the entire business lifecycle. From business sales to 409A valuations, we help business owners, law firms, and financial institutions navigate complex valuation requirements with confidence.
**✓ 409A Valuations ✓ Transaction Opinions ✓ M &A Valuations**
[ Contact us ](https://etonvs.com/contact/)
[ Download Brochure ](https://etonvs.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Eton-Company-Overview-2026.pdf)

## Why Eton?
####  We're Focused 
Business valuations are subjective and complex. To be robust and audit defensible, you need experienced experts in your corner. At Eton, we do nothing but valuations—it's our speciality.
####  We’re Human 
Should things turn contentious, our valuations are justifiable in court. We use expert human judgment and robust methodologies that no automated valuation could deliver.
####  We’re Trusted 
We've done thousands of business valuations for leading startups, VC firms, legal teams, accountants and high-net worth individuals. Our customer-centric approach to business keeps them coming back.
### End-to-end business appraisal services
## Our Valuation Services
Our valuation and advisory services are built around your specific needs. Each valuation results in a thorough report that provides a detailed overview of your business, drivers of value, valuation and our justification for it. 
We use professional judgment and advanced analytical techniques to deliver a robust, defensible valuation. Should it be challenged, we’ll provide additional support and defend our valuation.

## Our Leadership
![](https://etonvs.com/)
#### Chris Walton, JD
#### President & CEO
[ Linkedin-in ](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cswalton/)
[ Learn More ](https://etonvs.com/author/cwalton/)
**Chris Walton, JD** , is President and CEO and co-founded Eton Venture Services in 2010 to provide mission-critical valuations to private companies. He leads a team that collaborates closely with each client’s leadership, board of directors, internal / external counsel, and independent auditors to develop detailed financial models and create accurate, audit-ready valuations.
Chris has led thousands of valuations, including for equity securities, intangible assets, contingent considerations, financial instruments, investment valuations, convertible debt, business valuations for tax compliance purposes and financial reporting compliance requirements, as well as fairness and solvency opinions.
![](https://etonvs.com/)
#### Colton Owens, CFA
#### Director of valuation
[ Linkedin-in ](https://www.linkedin.com/in/coltonrowens/)
[ Learn More ](https://etonvs.com/author/cowens/)
**Colton Owens, CFA,** serves as Director of Valuation at Eton Venture Services and is responsible for managing client relationships, new business development, and delivering tailored audit-defensible valuation solutions to companies.
He specializes in valuations for a wide range of sponsor-backed, public and private company clients, from pre-revenue startups to upper middle-market firms, addressing financial reporting, tax, and transaction opinion valuation needs.
![](https://etonvs.com/)
#### Dalton Luong
#### Manager of Valuation
[ Linkedin-in ](https://www.linkedin.com/in/daltonluong/)
[ Learn More ](https://etonvs.com/author/daltonluong/)
**Dalton Luong** is Manager of Valuation at Eton Venture Services, responsible for oversight of a variety of valuation engagements, including business enterprises, intangible assets, and purchase price allocations.
He provides technical guidance and reviews valuation models and reports for compliance with applicable standards. Alongside the leadership team, he identifies and grows new business opportunities for the firm.

Smart Consulting for the Next Generation of Discerning Founders
# Startup   
Consulting  

###### Your startup has mountains to climb.   
We are the sherpa best equipped to help you summit.
###### Helping Companies Scale & Exit 
###### At Startup Consulting, we recognize that launching a startup is both an exhilarating and daunting journey. Our mission is to empower entrepreneurs like you with the insights, strategies, and support needed to turn your vision into a thriving business.  
  
Our team of seasoned consultants brings years of experience across various industries. We offer expert guidance tailored to your unique needs, helping you navigate the complexities of startup development. Whether you’re in the ideation phase or looking to scale, we’re here to help. 
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68f954c8ebb01a587736b5f9/68f954caebb01a587736b75b_serv-5.svg)#### [Finance & Accounting](https://startupconsulting.com/)
We help you build a strong online community, engage your audience, and increase your brand’s visibility across various social platforms.
[Learn More](https://startupconsulting.com/financial-planning)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68f954c8ebb01a587736b5f9/68f954caebb01a587736b759_serv-3.svg)#### [Marketing & Tech](https://startupconsulting.com/)
Our team of creative professionals excels at developing high-quality, engaging content that resonates with your target audience.
[Learn More](https://startupconsulting.com/digital-marketing)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68f954c8ebb01a587736b5f9/68f954caebb01a587736b758_serv-4.svg)#### [Process & Operations](https://startupconsulting.com/)
We conduct thorough research and use advanced analytics to segment your audience based on demographics, behavior, and preferences.
[Learn More](https://startupconsulting.com/operations)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68f954c8ebb01a587736b5f9/68f954caebb01a587736b757_serv-2.svg)#### [Legal & Compliance](https://startupconsulting.com/e-commerce-integration)
We build and optimize online stores that provide a seamless shopping experience for your customers.
[Learn More](https://startupconsulting.com/quality-assurance)
###### Empowering Founders. 
At **StartupConsulting.com** , we believe every great company begins with a great idea—and the right execution. Our mission is to help founders navigate the chaos of early growth with clarity, structure, and speed. We exist to turn entrepreneurial ambition into scalable, sustainable business success.
![Template Images](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68f954c8ebb01a587736b5f9/68f954caebb01a587736b72b_a-bunch-of-magazines-on-display-in-a-store.jpg)
![people sitting on chair i front of computer](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68f954c8ebb01a587736b5f9/68f954caebb01a587736b74f_people%20sitting%20on%20chair%20i%20front%20of%20computer.jpg)
![man in black shirt siting in front of computer](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68f954c8ebb01a587736b5f9/68f954caebb01a587736b748_man%20in%20blue%20polo%20shirt%20sitting%20on%20chair.jpg)
![Template Images](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68f954c8ebb01a587736b5f9/68f954caebb01a587736b709_a-cup-of-cappuccino-with-whipped-cream-on-top.jpg)
###### Accelerating Growth. 
We’re more than startup consultants. We’re founders, investors, and operators who’ve lived the startup journey firsthand. We know what it’s like to bootstrap, pitch to investors, meet payroll, and scale teams through uncertainty. That firsthand experience shapes everything we do—bringing you strategies that actually work, not theoretical frameworks.
## Blog

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68f954caebb01a587736b6c6/69b4caa405ee79ed5b949e31_Pass-Through%20vs.%20Corporate%20Taxation%20How%20It%20Affects%20Startup%20Founders.jpg)###### [Pass-Through vs. Corporate Taxation: How It Affects Startup Founders](https://startupconsulting.com/blog/pass-through-vs-corporate-taxation)

# Investment Consulting Tailored for the Institutional Investor
[Find Out More ](https://www.segalmarco.com/investment-consulting)
The global investment landscape is increasingly complex. Institutional investors need the guidance of an experienced consultant with proprietary research and cutting-edge tools to produce optimal results.
Work with us.
## Who we are
Segal Marco Advisors is one of the largest U.S.-based investment consulting firms, with combined discretionary and advisory assets exceeding $600 billion.
For more than 55 years, we’ve been advising organizations on investment strategy.
[Our History ](https://www.segalmarco.com/about-us/our-story)
![Investor Giving Advice To His Clients.](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2534/investor-giving-advice-to-his-clients.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134182266030000000) ![Investor Giving Advice To His Clients.](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2534/investor-giving-advice-to-his-clients.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134182266030000000)
### We’re one of the largest U.S.-based investment consultants.
![Financial Consultation In Progress With Advisors](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2535/financial-consultation-in-progress-with-advisors.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134182266460000000) ![Financial Consultation In Progress With Advisors](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2535/financial-consultation-in-progress-with-advisors.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134182266460000000)
## Independent advice you can count on
We’re proud to be an independent, employee-owned firm, which enables us to provide objective, high-quality advice.
Our senior professionals average more than 25 years of experience and have invested through all types of market conditions. They’ll draw on their expertise and Segal Marco’s research and technology to help your organization craft a comprehensive strategy or review and refine your existing one — and then execute it to help your organization achieve its investment objectives.
[Find Out More ](https://www.segalmarco.com/investment-consulting)
## Research to help you make informed decisions
Find clarity in today’s markets with our proprietary research. You’ll have access to thought leadership and analysis to help your decision-making.
[Learn About Our Research ](https://www.segalmarco.com/investment-research)
![Business Colleagues Analyzing The Market On A Screen](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2536/business-colleagues-analyzing-the-market-on-a-screen.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134182266780000000) ![Business Colleagues Analyzing The Market On A Screen](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2536/business-colleagues-analyzing-the-market-on-a-screen.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134182266780000000)
![A Female Investor Actively Listening To Her Business Client](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2537/a-female-investor-actively-listening-to-her-business-client.jpg?center=0.41216216216216217,0.58912386706948638&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134182268050000000) ![A Female Investor Actively Listening To Her Business Client](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2537/a-female-investor-actively-listening-to-her-business-client.jpg?center=0.41216216216216217,0.58912386706948638&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134182268050000000)
## A team that understands your challenges
You want to work with someone who has a proven track record of success in your industry. With our deep bench of investment consultants, we have the experience you seek. From Taft-Hartley plans and non-profits to Fortune 500 companies, we’ve got you covered.
[See Who We Help ](https://www.segalmarco.com/investment-industries)
## You can delegate decision-making about investing to us
We offer discretionary investment management so your team can concentrate on what you do best without having to worry about staying on top of the ever-evolving investment industry. As your outsourced chief investment officer (OCIO), we’ll take care of your portfolio.
![Investment Colleagues Discussing Over Market Report](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2526/investment-colleagues-discussing-over-market-report.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134171379150000000) ![Investment Colleagues Discussing Over Market Report](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2526/investment-colleagues-discussing-over-market-report.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134171379150000000)
![Mid Adult Businesswoman Presenting Ideas To Investment Team](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2525/mid-adult-businesswoman-presenting-ideas-to-investment-team.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134171378870000000) ![Mid Adult Businesswoman Presenting Ideas To Investment Team](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2525/mid-adult-businesswoman-presenting-ideas-to-investment-team.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134171378870000000)
## We can take care of proxy voting on your behalf
Proxy voting is one of our corporate governance services.
Each year, thousands of companies trust us to vote their proxies. Let us vote for your organization, guided by your proxy voting policy.
[Corporate Governance Services ](https://www.segalmarco.com/corporate-governance)

# The fastest way to finance software and hardware
Choose Capchase as your financing partner to close deals faster and increase your earnings. Approve your buyer, configure your offer, and win your deal in minutes.
[Book a call](https://www.capchase.com/demo)
Trusted by over 10,000 vendors & buyers
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2bfd6294531eb547b806e_gradient-1.webp)
### Buyers expect payment options
82% of U.S. companies use financing for equipment and software. If you don’t offer it, you risk losing the deal.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2c0d038469984e1c349d7_image-2.webp)
### Financing is often the roadblock
Clunky, slow, and unreliable processes stall sales. Done right, financing accelerates deals and keeps you in control.
### Capchase makes financing easier
Close high-velocity or high-complexity transactions in minutes, not weeks. Reseller partner approved.
## Experience the Capchase advantage
Embedded vendor financing that delivers faster approvals, easy deal configurations, and real-time deal status–right where you work.
For Sales
### Close more deals at a higher value
Use flexible payment options as a competitive advantage. Whether your customer prefers monthly, quarterly, or extended net terms - give them the choice they want.
[Learn more](https://www.capchase.com/department/sales)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68cc2f18bce12671fa026ec0_laptop-new.webp)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/67b486ac339ddec78540d46d_Card-neww.png)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/67adf0f761a0d053b55105ad_Finance-1.webp)
For Finance
### Get paid upfront without slowing sales
Offer payment flexibility while still getting paid upfront on every deal—including multi-year and reseller deals—eliminating billing headaches and putting an end to chasing payments.
[Learn more](https://www.capchase.com/department/finance)
## Win-win for your business, partners, and customers
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2da91024544ae491cae81_webp.webp)
### Vendors & Manufacturers
Get paid upfront, empower customers with flexible payments, and leave the collections burden to us. Partner channel approved.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2dabce8165ab45ce7b7dd_layout.webp)
### Reseller Partners
Cut closing from weeks to minutes with easy financing, seamless checkout, and faster payouts.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2daef4a17b8835cbdcbc1_buyer.webp)
### Buyers
Allow your customers to optimize their cash flow while still purchasing the tech they need to be successful.
## Everything you need to simplify B2B financing
Use Capchase from within your sales team's daily tools. Create a white-labeled captive financing program. Enjoy a faster, more responsive, and better experience.  

[Learn more](https://www.capchase.com/features)
### Easy deal configuration  

Generate payment options to best fit your deal including term length, payment frequency, net terms, and subsidy—calculating pricing in real-time.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/679b7b12129d16826d688902_PL-visual.svg)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/679b7bc368ed600e8a5ded7f_Vendor-PL.svg)
### Instant buyer qualification
Approve your customers in advance—in just minutes not weeks—so you can offer financing confidently.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68cc1631ae0cd168e0f2e1d5_ui.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68cc1631ae0cd168e0f2e1d5_ui.png)
### Captive financing program  

Extending your brand throughout the payments experience, powered and funded by Capchase.
### Embedded in your sales tools
Work directly in Salesforce CRM, receive immediate updates in Slack or Teams, track your buyer’s order completion live.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/679b817a692182130c28f0d8_salseforce.svg)
